headline: Arke Officially Rebrands to MSQ DX: A New Global Era Begins
summary: Today, Arke officially rebrands as MSQ DX, marking the next chapter in MSQ's digital evolution and establishing a stronger, more connected foundation for growth in the U.S. market and beyond.
